name: io.github.spedas/spedas-mcp
title: SPEDAS MCP
description: Unified SPEDAS-oriented MCP server combining vendored CDAWeb, PDS PPI, and SPICE capabilities

environmentVariables.name: XHELIO_CDAWEB_CACHE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Override the default CDAWeb cache directory (~/.cdawebmcp/)

environmentVariables.name: PDSMCP_CACHE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Override the default PDS PPI cache directory (~/.pdsmcp/)

environmentVariables.name: XHELIO_SPICE_KERNEL_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Override the default SPICE kernel cache directory (~/.xhelio_spice/kernels/)

environmentVariables.name: SPEDAS_MCP_COMPAT_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to advertise legacy CDAWeb/PDS compatibility browse/load/parameter/fetch tools; unset by default for the compact unified tool surface.
